customer_name.evidence: Agent: Mansi this side from the HDFC Life insurance... Customer: Mam hamari age toh lamsam 45 saal hai. (Note: Customer name not explicitly stated, 'Mansi' is the agent's name. Customer name is not_disclosed.)

age.evidence: Customer: Mam hamari age toh lamsam 45 saal hai.

income_band_inr.evidence: Customer: Annual income man lijiye 10-15 lakh rupaye.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Soch ke bataunga aapko... Abhi thoda kaam mein hu, thoda baad mein baat karta hu aap se.

objections.quote: Abhi thoda kaam mein hu, thoda baad mein baat karta hu aap se.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Agent: Agar sir main aapko salana 1 lakh se plan explain kar du toh aap comfortable rahenge? Customer: Haan mam, theek hai, kar dijiye.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Business karte hain mam. (Implies sole decision maker for business/finances)

agent_promises: first year se 40 percent ki income milti hai
21 lakh rupees ki maturity mil jati hai
24 se 25 lakh rupees ki aapko maturity mil jati hai

product_fit.mismatch_reason: The product was pushed aggressively with unrealistic return claims, and the customer showed no specific interest.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about existing insurance or financial goals.

approachability.reasoning: Customer was polite but clearly busy and ended the call to avoid further pressure, though he did listen to the pitch.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced an online campaign for HDFC Life, and the customer responded politely.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was passive, listening to the pitch but ultimately disengaged due to being busy.
call_narrative.key_event: The agent made multiple aggressive guaranteed return claims, leading the customer to politely dismiss the pitch.
call_narrative.ending: The customer ended the call by stating he was busy and would think about it.

key_quotes: Abhi thoda kaam mein hu, thoda baad mein baat karta hu aap se.
